steps.title: Cancel the constants
steps.content:
Add $9$ to both sides of the equation.
$$
(d-28)(d+28)-9=-9
$$
$$
(d-28)(d+28)=0
$$

steps.title: Use one zero factor
steps.content:
A product is $0$ when at least one factor is $0$. Since the question asks for a solution, use the first factor.
$$
d-28=0
$$

steps.title: Solve the simple equation
steps.content: Add $28$ to both sides. The answer is 28.
